image.image_prompt: Create a refined tech-news infographic style hero image for a social post or article cover, square or 16:9 composition. Theme: obituary and legacy of pioneering computer scientist Michael O. Rabin. Visualize the foundations of theoretical computer science with symbolic imagery: a dignified abstract silhouette or portrait-inspired figure in shadow, surrounded by finite-state automata diagrams, elegant state-transition arcs, probability particles, algorithmic flow lines, and subtle string-matching patterns evoking randomized algorithms and Rabin-Karp. Add a restrained memorial mood with deep navy, charcoal, silver, and soft electric blue accents, cinematic contrast, clean negative space, sharp editorial layout, minimal text or no readable text, high legibility at thumbnail size. Style should feel intellectual, modern, respectful, and premium—like a serious technology magazine cover, not a flashy advertisement. Avoid clutter, avoid cheesy stock-photo aesthetics, avoid excessive UI elements. Emphasize symbolic legacy, computation, mathematics, and lasting influence on modern computer science.
